{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Karoshan colonies
| introduced = lh-04-the-pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Karoshan colonies]] are enormous cubes.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c20">''The Pilot'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
